title: Software Update - DFU is not available during a call
scenario: DFU is blocked with a pop-up when attempting to update device firmware during an active call
steps: Ensure the headset is on outdated firmware.
Initiate an active call on the paired device.
While on the call, navigate to the Software Update page in Device Settings.
expected: A pop-up appears stating "Cannot update this device during a call". After tapping OK, the pop-up closes and the user is returned to the Software Update tab without starting the DFU.
